calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Notice And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Atty'S Fees Pursuant To Labor Code 218.5
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Creditors Trade Associaiton, Inc, dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Motion for an award of attorney fees.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendant Arturo Roverso.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff's motion for attorney fees is GRANTED. Defendant Arturo Roverso shall pay plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, attorney fees in the amount of $6,000.00.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Settlement on the Record as to Defendant E. Antonio Reina and Default Prove Up as to Defendant Arturo Roverso hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
D. Provencher, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditor Trade Assoc Inc dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by Defaulted Defendant Arturo Roverso.
Gino Molinari, Esq. for and with Co-Defendant E. Antonio Reina.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Parties agreed and stipulated for an entry of future judgment against the Defendant E. Antonio Reina in the amount of $21,883.54, stayed from enforcement for 180 days, with 10 days notice to counsel of any future request for Entry of Judgment. Counsel to reduce the agreement to writing and to prepare the stipulation for signature by the parties.
Prove Up as to Co-Defendant Arturo Roverso.
Exhibit 1---CPF 06-506410 Clerk's Judgment -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---CPF 06-506605 Clerk's Judgment -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---CPF 06-506647 Clerk's Judgment -------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Arturo Rovers as follows:
Damages $21,883.54
Attorney fee per Motion
Costs $402.50, for a total of $22,286.04
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 218 by Oct. 1, 2009 and stipulated for the return of the Exhibits.
